creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
So here's the thing about the FAQ.

tl:dr; it needs to die.

Longer explanation:

The fate of the "information in the FAQ" has been debated to death for years.  My recommendation is to figure out ways to update documentation information in the mainline docs and/or the wiki first, and then leave the FAQ garbage-pile for later.

Thanks.
